name: Omon.phydiatos
title: Surface Mole Concentration of Diatoms Expressed as Carbon in Sea Water
description: carbon from the diatom phytoplankton component concentration alone
processing note:
This is a regional subset of the variable. If you are producing the global equivalent of Omon.phydiatos, you should omit this regional South30 version. 
CHANGE SINCE CMIP6 in Dimensions - CMIP6:longitude latitude time CMIP7:longitude latitude time depth0m,
